name: SqueezeOS
description: Institutional market intelligence for AI agents — 62 tools including council verdicts, squeeze scanner, options flow, oracle data feeds, futures, agent-to-agent settlement, Cognitive Credit Swarms, IAM resolver, Sovereign signal suite, AEO/GEO intelligence suite, Truth Engine, Memory Graph, FRED macro data, and RWA Intelligence Suite, and x402 micropayments via USDC on Base or RLUSD on XRPL.

tools.name: demo_council
tools.description: Free preview of council_verdict, scoped to IWM.

tools.name: council_verdict
tools.description: Institutional-grade BUY/SELL/HOLD directive for US equities.

tools.description: Full $1-$50 equity universe squeeze scanner.

tools.description: Institutional options flow: PUT/CALL sweep detection.

tools.name: iam_truth
tools.description: IAM Truth Layer — neutral obligation-pressure state for a symbol, no direction forced.

tools.name: memory_stats
tools.description: Free. Real count of an agent's stored memories by type and active storage backend.

tools.name: fred_series
tools.description: Latest observation plus full series metadata for any FRED series. 0.01 RLUSD.
